assertions: Codex auth and full-access migration notes are generated from fragments instead of hand-authored markdown
Codex full-access behavior remains a daemon-owned harness envelope anchored to C7 security and C4 adapter evidence
OpenClaw and Cursor migration claims remain concrete provider-adapter ACL history, not bundled CLI distribution claims
Supervisor migration claims remain daemon-tier orchestration evidence, not task DB lease ownership
Taskdbplane migration claims remain local JSON control-plane adapter evidence with guarded mutations and lease fencing
